arts.ttl: Erol Bulut reveals another player he wanted for Cardiff City – Now shining under Jose Mourinho
arts.sum: Erol Bulut has revealed to the Turkish media that he wanted to sign Fenerbahce attacker Oğuz Aydın when he was Cardiff City manager. Bulut was released by the Championship side in September after a poor start to the season. T24 have covered comments the former Cardiff City man has made to Bein Sports this week The post Erol Bulut reveals another player he wanted for Cardiff City – Now shining under Jose Mourinho appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: 'Danger to life' weather warning for Cardiff as Watford FC to travel tomorrow
arts.sum: Life-threatening weather is expected to hit South Wales tomorrow as Watford FC are set to travel to Cardiff City Stadium.

arts.ttl: “We’re not in control” – Manager says club helpless if Watford exercise clause in January, prepared to lose player
arts.sum: Brøndby IF signed Mileta Rajović from Watford on a loan deal late in the summer window. The striker has made 12 appearances in all competitions for the Danish club, scoring six goals and registering one assist in the process. The Hornets have an option to cut short his loan stay at Brøndby in the winter The post “We’re not in control” – Manager says club helpless if Watford exercise clause in January, prepared to lose player appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Free agent finds new club following Cardiff City exit
arts.sum: AFC Wimbledon have signed Romaine Sawyers following his exit from Cardiff City, as announced by their official club… The post Free agent finds new club following Cardiff City exit appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Gino Pozzo reveals Watford yet to make decision over January transfer – Rates player highly
arts.sum: Watford have not yet made a decision over what to do about Mileta Rajović in the winter market. That’s according to Watford owner Gino Pozzo and he revealed this during an interview with Tipsbladet. Watford signed the 25-year-old from Swedish side Kalmar FF in August 2023 and gave him a contract until 2028.
